article_meta.title: Defense Coast Guard denies report it won't classify swastikas, nooses as hate symbols by Filip Timotija 11/20/25 03:23 P

reasoning: The model repeatedly flagged quoted source language as author bias, used non-standard/incorrect bias type labels, and included questionable items (e.g., ad insertion) as bias. It did not identify clear author-level bias and instead relied on quotes or speculative framing critiques.

custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most flagged items are not genuine author-prose bias: ad content is not ideological bias; leading with the denial is standard news structure; quotes from DHS are not the author's voice; burying an item is speculative.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: The article contains little to no clear bias in the author's own prose, so few to no missed instances.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed labels (e.g., Framing Bias, Spin/Tone Bias) and misapplied types (calling placement an Omission).
